methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $30M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Nuclear Energy (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 8 same-sector peers exist in Nuclear Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy

data.narrative:
Deep Fission, a Seed-stage nuclear energy company founded by Elizabeth and Richard Muller, has raised $30M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 11 comparable companies—3 public (OKLO, NNE, SMR) and 8 private, including Oklo, TerraPower, X-Energy, Kairos Power, and Nano Nuclear Energy—though the nuclear energy subsector remains sparse at the Seed stage.

Stage-progression methodology is the primary applicable approach. Using the $30M raised as a valuation proxy and applying a typical 2.5x step-up multiplier from Seed to the next financing stage yields $75M. A peer-median valuation approach was not executable due to insufficient comparable datapoints at the same or adjacent stage within a defensible peer set; the eight nuclear energy peers do not cluster sufficiently around Deep Fission's stage and profile to support reliable cross-sectional analysis.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $64M (low) to $86M (high), with a median of $75M. This estimate carries material uncertainty given reliance on a single method and the immature stage of the private nuclear energy market. Key sensitivities include execution risk on core technology, regulatory pathway clarity, and the broader capital availability for frontier-stage nuclear ventures. Investors should treat this range as indicative pending deeper technical and market diligence.
